about.summary: I am Adeel Abid, a passionate Frontend Developer with 3+ years of experience building modern, responsive, and user-friendly web applications. Skilled in React.js, Redux Toolkit, Tailwind CSS, and SASS, I focus on writing clean, scalable, and maintainable code. I have worked on SaaS platforms, CRM systems, and freelance projects, developing intuitive UI components, improving performance, and collaborating with teams. Currently, I am also working on my own car rental marketplace product. I continuously learn new technologies to create pixel-perfect designs and enhance user experiences.

summary: Contributing to the development of Prodoo (SaaS Platform) by enhancing user interface and user experience.
Implementing new features, UI upgrades, and SEO-friendly optimizations to improve website performance and accessibility.
Collaborating in a dynamic team environment, continuously improving frontend skills and ensuring modern, scalable, and maintainable code.
Developed a CRM project using MERN stack (MongoDB, Express.js, React, Node.js) with focus on frontend implementation.
Implemented new features, performed debugging, and collaborated with senior developers to ensure smooth project delivery.
Gained hands-on experience with PrimeReact, Sass, and Jira for project management and UI enhancement.
Designed and developed the Online Car Service Station System with separate user and admin panels.
Built features like service booking, cart functionality, and dynamic user interactions.
Ensured an efficient, user-friendly, and responsive design using modern frontend practices.
Completed 10+ freelance projects, including business websites and management systems.
Delivered customized solutions for small businesses, improving their online presence and functionality.
Maintained a client-first approach, achieving positive reviews and repeat business.
Adapted to different industries, showcasing flexibility and strong problem-solving skills.

projects.Name: Prodoo
projects.Summary: Prodoo is a professional hiring platform that connects independent professionals with recruiters. Professionals can build detailed resumes, add skills and portfolios, while recruiters post job opportunities and search candidates. The system enables shortlisting, sending invitations, and contract signing—streamlining the end-to-end hiring workflow.

projects.Name: CRM (Customer Relationship Management)
projects.Summary: I built a ReactJS-based CRM with a dashboard showcasing enrollments and a seamless process for creating them, including personal info, device/SIM selection, shipping, plan choice, and payment via Authorize.net, Stripe, or PayPal, and used following Technologies ==> HTML, CSS, Sass, Bootstrap, JavaScript, ReactJS, Prime React, Redux Toolkit, GitHub, Firebase.

projects.Name: TechStore
projects.Summary: I developed TechStore, an e-commerce web app featuring products like laptops, phones, watches, and accessories. Users can add items to the cart, manage quantities, view the total amount, and proceed to checkout seamlessly, and used following Technologies ==> HTML, CSS, Sass, Bootstrap, JavaScript, ReactJS, Redux Toolkit, GitHub, Firebase.

projects.Name: Manzil Drive
projects.Summary: I developed Manzil Drive, a transportation management system for booking and managing rides with user profiles. Currently, I am working on a car rental marketplace where providers can create shops, list vehicles, and offer event-based booking packages, while users can browse and book cars online. Real-time tracking and payment integration are planned for future updates. Following Technologies were used ==> HTML, CSS, Tailwind CSS, JavaScript, React.js, Redux Toolkit, React Query, Firebase, GitHub, Node.js, Express.js, MongoDB, Vercel.

projects.Name: FIXnGO
projects.Summary: I developed FIXnGO, a platform for connecting customers with local service providers. The app features real-time booking, user profiles, and seamless payment integration, and used following Technologies ==> HTML, CSS, Sass, Bootstrap, JavaScript, ReactJS, Redux Toolkit, GitHub, Firebase. Following Technologies were used ==> HTML, CSS, Tailwind CSS, JavaScript, React.js, Redux Toolkit, React Query, Azure, Vercel, SQL

projects.Name: Online Car Service Station
projects.Summary: Designed the user Interface of my Final Year Project (Online Car Service Station System) with user and admin panel having the functionality of adding services by user to cart, Like Ecommerce.
